executionArgs.additionalInstruction: RULES: (1) No CAPTCHA. (2) Register: password2 required, strong password 'Xq7!mZ2#vL9', unique email with timestamp. (3) Login invalid = 401. (4) Token refresh no-cookie = 401, Spanish msg 'No hay sesión activa.' check 'no hay' in detail.lower(). (5) add_item: field 'product_id', returns Cart status 201. (6) Checkout POST returns {id, order_number, ...} status 201. (7) GET /health/ = 200 JSON with status/service/timestamp keys. POST /health/ = 405. (8) returns/policy: returns config object with keys window_days_new, steps, document — NOT {policy: string}. (9) Base URL http://localhost /api/v1/.
